name: VERU INC.
summary: Veru Inc. is a late clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel medicines for cardiometabolic and inflammatory diseases. Its pipeline includes enobosarm, an oral selective androgen receptor modulator (SARM) being developed to enhance GLP-1 RA weight loss by preserving lean mass and reducing fat, and sabizabulin, a microtubule disruptor for atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease inflammation. On December 30, 2024, Veru sold its FDA-approved FC2 Female Condom commercial product.
